◎简　　介  

　　Explores an incident in Scottsboro, AL in 1991. Glenn Summerford, a Pentecostal minister, was accused of attempting to murder his wife with a rattlesnake. The details of the investigation and the trial that followed has haunted Southern Appalachia for decades.
